properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Morning light of each new day Your love guides me all the way Through the highs and through the lows In Your grace my heart still grows

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Mountains tall and valleys deep Your hand holds me while I sleep Every step and every fall Through it all You hear my call

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Thank You, God, for all You′ve done And the grace that flows on In the night and in the day Goodness and mercy lead my way

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Years may come and years may go But Your love is all I know Through the storms and gentle breeze Your peace puts my soul at ease (oh)

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Hearts may break and tears may fall Still Your wonders they still show In the dark or in the light You're my rock, You′re my sight

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Thank You, God Thank You, God Thank You, God
